overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in period clothing exploring a cypress swamp. The character walks along muddy trails and through shallow water, with weather transitioning from overcast to rainy as they approach a wooden stilt house.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a muddy path surrounded by cypress trees and Spanish moss

entered.detail: tall cypress trees with Spanish moss hanging from branches surrounding the path
wet muddy trail winding through the swamp grass
clumps of tall swamp grass lining the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dry muddy trail through an open cypress swamp. Tall trees with Spanish moss surround the path while tufts of swamp grass line the edges. The sky is overcast and gray, casting diffused light across the wetland.

events.description: ground transitions from muddy trail to shallow swamp water with lily pads
light rain begins to fall, creating ripples on the water surface

agents.ego_description: splashing through shallow water with lily pads, moving toward denser tree cover

entered.detail: shallow murky water covering the ground with floating green lily pads
green lily pads floating on the water surface
massive ancient tree with wide spreading branches visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the muddy trail and enters shallow swamp water covered with lily pads. Rain begins to fall lightly as the character approaches a large ancient tree visible in the distance. The cypress trees now flank both sides of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded swamp approaching wooden stilt house

events.description: rain intensifies, creating heavier ripples and splashes in the water
wooden stilt house emerges from behind the trees on the left

agents.ego_description: moving through deeper water toward a wooden structure while rain falls steadily

entered.detail: weathered wooden house raised on stilts above the flood water

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large ancient tree and a weathered wooden shack built on stilts to the left. The rain falls more heavily now, splashing around the character's legs as they wade through deeper water. The tree canopy becomes denser, partially obscuring the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open cypress swamp that gradually becomes more enclosed and rain-swept as it approaches a remote shelter. It begins with the character walking along a dry muddy trail under a gray, overcast sky, surrounded by tall trees draped in Spanish moss and tufts of swamp grass. As the character leaves the path, the terrain shifts into shallow water covered with lily pads and a light rain begins to fall. The scene then intensifies as the rain becomes heavier and the water deepens, with the camera moving toward a massive ancient tree and a weathered wooden shack built on stilts. Finally, the tree canopy closes in to partially obscure the sky, casting the character in deeper shadow as they wade toward the structure.
